shell.noAccessibleMenu: No accessible menu for this account

dashboard.defaultDescription: Here is a summary of the projects and delivery items relevant to you.
dashboard.overviewDescription: Statistics include only projects within your data scope
dashboard.tasksDescription: Pending reviews, rejected revisions, project milestones and unread notifications
dashboard.risksDescription: Projects in your data scope that require immediate attention
dashboard.recentProjectsDescription: Visible projects ordered by most recent update
dashboard.recentActivitiesDescription: Sanitized activity from projects visible to your account
dashboard.sectionLoadFailed: This section failed to load. Other dashboard data is unaffected.

roleDescriptions.SUPER_ADMIN: Prioritize system health, access configuration and critical delivery exceptions.
roleDescriptions.SYSTEM_ADMIN: Prioritize system health, access configuration and critical delivery exceptions.
roleDescriptions.DELIVERY_MANAGER: This view summarizes projects, reviews, milestones and high-risk items in your data scope.
roleDescriptions.COUNTRY_MANAGER: Focus on delivery progress, document closure and site risks for projects in your countries.
roleDescriptions.PROJECT_MANAGER: Prioritize pending reviews, rejected versions, milestones and project risks.
roleDescriptions.ELEC_LEADER: Review electrical design, installation and commissioning records and close site issues.
roleDescriptions.ELEC_ENGINEER: Complete today's electrical submissions, point checks and commissioning records.
roleDescriptions.SOFTWARE_LEADER: Focus on software configuration, integration verification and remote issue closure.
roleDescriptions.SOFTWARE_ENGINEER: Update software configuration and commissioning records and complete delivery evidence.
roleDescriptions.PURCHASE: Track procurement lead times, receipt acceptance and procurement records.
roleDescriptions.FINANCE: Monitor delivery milestones and pending notifications for your projects.
roleDescriptions.HSE: Review safety briefings, site risks and corrective-action closure.
roleDescriptions.STANDARD_ADMIN: Prioritize reviews and revisions for standards, knowledge and archive templates.
roleDescriptions.PARTNER: Review authorized projects and missing files, then submit the required delivery evidence.

risk.empty: No high-risk projects in your data scope

review.summaryLoadFailed: Review statistics are temporarily unavailable. The task list is still available.
review.keywordPlaceholder: Search files, archive items, projects, standards or knowledge
review.retryHint: Check your network connection or try again later.
review.noPreview: This review task has no previewable file version
review.cannotAct: This task is not assigned to you yet or you lack review permission

dialog.title: Process File Review
dialog.assignmentHint: This action processes only the review step assigned to you. After approval, the configured workflow continues or completes the task.
dialog.rejectCommentRequired: A review comment is required when rejecting
dialog.approveSuccess: The current review step was approved

notifications.title: Notification Rules
notifications.description: Configure in-app, Feishu and WeCom notifications by business event. Channel secrets are not stored here.
notifications.readOnlyHint: You can view notification rules but cannot create, edit, enable, disable or delete them.
notifications.name: Rule Name
notifications.searchPlaceholder: Search rule name or event type
notifications.namePlaceholder: For example, Project archive review reminder
notifications.rolePlaceholder: Enter a role code and press Enter
notifications.userPlaceholder: Enter a user ID and press Enter
notifications.templatePlaceholder: Optional; leave blank to use the event default

validation.basic: Enter a rule name and event type
validation.channel: Select at least one notification channel
validation.recipient: Configure at least one recipient role or user

notifications.deleteConfirm: Delete notification rule “{name}”? If delivery records exist, the server will disable it and retain its history.

systemConfig.title: System Settings
systemConfig.description: Manage project, file, review, knowledge and security settings through a defined configuration model.
systemConfig.readOnlyHint: You can view system settings and server time but cannot save changes.
systemConfig.extensionsPlaceholder: Enter an extension and press Enter, for example pdf
systemConfig.extensionsHint: Do not include a dot. Letters and numbers only; up to 50 entries.
systemConfig.sessionHint: Changes apply only to new sessions; allowed range: 1 to 720 hours.
systemConfig.timeReadOnly: The server timezone is read-only runtime information and cannot be changed here.
systemConfig.auditHint: Changes are recorded in the operation log.
systemConfig.extensionRequired: Keep at least one allowed file extension

logs.title: Operation Logs
logs.description: Search audit records for sensitive views, file operations, access changes and system settings.

approvals.title: Approval Settings
approvals.description: Approval settings create unified review tasks only for registered business types. Review actions are completed in File Review.
approvals.readOnlyHint: You can view approval templates but cannot create, edit, enable, disable or delete them.
approvals.roleCodes: Enter a role code and press Enter; multiple values are allowed
approvals.userIds: Enter a user ID and press Enter; multiple values are allowed

validation.stepRequired: An approval template requires at least one step
validation.basic: Enter a flow code and flow name
validation.stepComplete: Complete the name and approver for every approval step
validation.modeInvalid: The approval mode, approver count or required approval count is invalid

approvals.deleteConfirm: Delete approval template “{name}”? Existing review tasks will not be deleted.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Feishu and WeCom are available for contact synchronization and notifications.
integrations.readOnlyHint: You can view configuration status and sync logs but cannot edit credentials, test connections or sync contacts.
integrations.secretWarningHint: Saved secrets are displayed only as ******. Enter the complete value again to replace one.
integrations.replaceSecretPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current value
integrations.configuredReplaceHint: Configured (******). Enter a new value to replace it.
integrations.webhookOptionalHint: Optional; only official Feishu HTTPS addresses are allowed.
integrations.departmentPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the provider root department

validation.name: Enter a configuration name
validation.credentials: Complete the identity credentials before enabling this integration

integrations.saved: Integration configuration saved. Secrets are never displayed on this page.
integrations.operationFailed: Integration operation failed. Check the sync logs.
integrations.syncSuccess: Contact sync completed: {added} added, {updated} updated, {conflicts} conflicts

currency.title: Currencies & Rates
currency.description: Manage available currencies and CNY exchange rates. Project creation stores an independent rate snapshot.
currency.readOnlyHint: You can view currencies and rates but cannot edit, synchronize or lock them.
currency.ratePlaceholder: CNY amount equivalent to one unit of this currency
currency.rateLockedHint: Unlock the rate before editing it.

validation.code: Currency code must contain 3 to 10 uppercase letters
validation.name: Enter a currency name

currency.disableConfirm: New projects will no longer be able to select {code}. Historical amount snapshots are unaffected.

tools.managerDescription: Maintain tool information and control visibility
tools.userDescription: Select a tool to start using it
tools.loadFailed: Failed to load the tool catalog
tools.retryHint: Check your network connection and try again
tools.name: Tool Name

validation.configuration: Tool configuration must be a JSON object
validation.name: Enter a tool name
validation.externalUrl: External tools require an access URL
validation.httpOnly: External tools support only HTTP(S) URLs
validation.internalRoute: Internal tool routes must start with /

tools.disableConfirm: Disable “{name}”? Regular users will no longer see this tool.
tools.missingEntry: This tool has no configured entry point

projects.title: Project Register
projects.description: View project status, stage, amounts and owners within your data scope.
projects.archiveHint: Archived projects move from the active list to the archive list.

progress.rollbackRequired: Required when moving to an earlier stage

projects.searchPlaceholder: Search project name, code or customer
projects.archiveConfirm: Archive project “{name}”? Authorized users can restore it later.
projects.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete project “{name}”? This cannot be undone and will be written to the high-risk operation audit. The server will block deletion and explain why when files, reviews, finance records or required audit links exist.
projects.deleteVerifyHint: Enter project code {code}. Permanent deletion runs immediately after verification.
projects.deleteCodeMismatch: The project code does not match
projects.finalDeleteConfirm: Final confirmation: permanently delete this archived project?
projects.rollbackHint: Moving a stage backward affects subsequent delivery work. Enter a reason.
projects.rollbackRequired: A reason is required when moving a stage backward
projects.conflict: This project was updated elsewhere. The latest data has been loaded; review it and submit again.

createForm.optionsFailed: Some configuration options failed to load. Refresh and try again.
createForm.contractHiddenHint: Hidden in details when the viewer lacks permission
createForm.amountPlaceholder: Enter the amount in the original currency
createForm.riskPlaceholder: Describe the cause, impact and response plan
createForm.auditHint: Saving records the editor, time and changes to key project fields.
createForm.conflict: The create request conflicts with this draft. Close the create panel, reopen it, and confirm the data before submitting.

detailPage.loadFailedHint: Check that the project exists and that your account has access.
detailPage.name: Name

projects.actionReasonHint: Optionally enter a reason. It will be recorded in the audit log.
projects.actionReasonPlaceholder: Optional: reason for the status change
projects.stageRollbackRequired: A reason is required when moving a stage backward
projects.acceptanceRequired: Enter at least an expected or actual acceptance date
projects.paymentRequired: Enter a payment milestone and receivable amount

filePreview.title: File Preview
filePreview.sessionFailed: Unable to create a controlled preview session. Try again or download the original file if you have permission.
filePreview.pageLimit: The first {count} pages were rendered. Download the file to view the rest.
filePreview.pdfFailed: PDF preview rendering failed. Download the file to view it.
filePreview.mediaFailed: This media file cannot be played. Download it to view it.
filePreview.xmindFailed: The XMind outline could not be read. Download the file to view it.
filePreview.officeUnavailableHint: The conversion service is not ready. Try again later or download the original file.
filePreview.downloadHint: Download this file to view it.

archiveTemplate.title: Archive Templates
archiveTemplate.subtitle: Published versions remain read-only. Directory changes require a new draft and another review and release.
archiveTemplate.searchPlaceholder: Search by template name or code
archiveTemplate.publishedHint: A published version is an immutable snapshot. Create a new version from the list to make changes.
archiveTemplate.emptyDraft: This draft has no directory structure yet
archiveTemplate.extensionsPlaceholder: Allowed extensions, such as pdf, docx

validation.masterRequired: Enter the template code and name
validation.folderRequired: The template needs at least one folder

messages.created: Template created. Complete the first draft version.
messages.standardFoldersAdded: The 37 standard top-level categories were added to this draft
messages.reviewSubmitted: Template version submitted for review and the draft structure is now locked
messages.published: Template version published. New projects will copy this version snapshot.

disable.title: Disable Archive Template
disable.confirm: After “{name}” is disabled, it cannot be used for new projects. Existing project snapshots and version history are unaffected.

archive.title: Project Archive
archive.subtitle: The archive structure is copied from the template when a project is created. Later synchronization only adds items and never overwrites existing records.
archive.projectSearchPlaceholder: Search by project name or code
archive.emptySnapshot: This project does not have an archive snapshot yet
archive.emptyFolder: No archive items in this folder
archive.uploadAsIndependent: Upload as a new independent file
archive.changePlaceholder: Describe the changes in this file
archive.temporaryHint: A temporary item belongs only to this project. Suggesting it for the template records a suggestion and does not modify a published template.
archive.extensionsPlaceholder: For example: pdf, docx, xlsx. Leave blank to use the platform allowlist
archive.approvalTemplatePlaceholder: Select a project archive approval template
archive.migrationRequired: Migrate the current snapshot before synchronizing
archive.alreadyLatest: This project archive is already up to date
archive.syncHint: Only new folders and items will be added. Existing project content will not be overwritten, renamed, or deleted.

validation.temporaryRequired: Enter the item name and reason, then select an owner
validation.approvalTemplateRequired: Select a project archive approval template when review is required

messages.previewRestricted: This file is under review. Only the uploader, current reviewer, or an authorized user can preview it.
messages.noPreviewFile: This archive item has no previewable file
messages.uploadedForReview: Upload complete. The file has entered review.
messages.noAvailableFolder: This project has no available archive folders
messages.temporaryCreated: Temporary archive item created for this project only
messages.templateSynced: Template additions synchronized without changing existing archive content

archiveItem.title: Archive Item
archiveItem.confirm: Archiving “{name}” will retain all files and version history. Continue?

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Unified review and version management for files, Markdown, and external links
knowledge.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, file name, or summary
knowledge.loadFailed: Failed to load knowledge resources. Please try again.
knowledge.editMasterHint: Published version content is not changed here.
knowledge.readonlyHint: Published versions are read-only. Revisions require an explicit new version.
knowledge.fileDraftHint: The file is saved as a controlled draft and published only after approval.
knowledge.keepFileHint: Leave the new file empty to keep the current file.
knowledge.supportingHint: Select multiple attachments at once; attachments and primary content share version control.
knowledge.versionSupportingHint: Existing attachments can be removed and new ones can be appended.
knowledge.versionDraftHint: Drafts can be saved repeatedly. Content locks after review submission and published versions are never overwritten.

validation.linkInvalid: Enter a complete HTTP or HTTPS URL
validation.masterRequired: Enter a title and select a knowledge category

messages.noPreviewFile: No previewable file is available for this version
messages.noDownloadFile: This version has no downloadable file
messages.publishedNoDownload: The published version of this resource is not a downloadable file

review.title: Submit for Review
review.confirm: Submit version {version} to the unified file review process?

archive.title: Archive Knowledge Resource
archive.confirm: All historical versions will be retained. Archive “{title}”?

standard.title: Standards Library
standard.subtitle: A unified version library for SOPs, workflows, inspection standards, and templates
standard.searchPlaceholder: Search by standard name, code, or file name
standard.loadFailed: Failed to load the standards list. Please try again.
standard.editMasterHint: Published version content is not changed here.
standard.readonlyHint: Published versions are read-only. Create a new draft version to revise them.
standard.fileDraftHint: The file will be saved as a controlled draft and published only after approval.
standard.newFileHint: A new file will not overwrite history. Leave it empty to keep the current file.
standard.versionDraftHint: Drafts can be saved repeatedly; the version file and description are locked after review submission.

validation.masterRequired: Enter the standard code, name, and type
validation.nameRequired: Enter the standard code and name
validation.versionFileRequired: Select a file for the new version

messages.publishedNoDownload: This standard has no published version available for download

review.title: Submit for Review
review.confirm: Submit version {version} to the unified file review process?

archive.title: Archive Standard
archive.confirm: All historical versions will be retained. Archive “{name}”?

login.slogan: Delivery management, kept in one clear system.
login.introduction: Sign in with your organization account.
